#Kuwait Deputy Prime Minister, Minister of State for Cabinet Sharida Al-Maousherji Thursday renewed Kuwait's condemnation of Iranian attacks on #GCC states & Jordan, describing them blatant violation of states' sovereignty & international resolutions. Al-Maousherji affirmed Kuwait's support for international efforts led by #Pakistan to reach a sustainable peace agreement that prevents the return of tensions to the region.  #Kuna

Latifa bint Mohammed visits KTH Innovation, the innovation arm of the KTH Royal Institute of Technology in Sweden. During the visit, Her Highness was briefed on the centre’s innovation model, which supports researchers, students, and entrepreneurs in transforming research and ideas into startups and projects with tangible economic and societal impact.

During her visit to Stockholm, Latifa bint Mohammed meets with Swedish businessman Marcus Wallenberg. The meeting reviewed major global economic shifts and explored key drivers of innovation and investment, as well as the role of the private sector in advancing sustainable development and strengthening economic competitiveness. The meeting also explored promising opportunities within future-oriented sectors, and ways to attract top talent and high-impact investments.

استقبل اللواء الركن عوض سعيد بن مصلح الأحبابي، قائد العمليات المشتركة، في مكتبه، الفريق الركن فرانسوا كسافييه مابان، مفتش القوات المسلحة الفرنسية، والوفد المرافق له. وجرى خلال اللقاء بحث علاقات التعاون العسكري بين دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة والجمهورية الفرنسية وسبل تعزيزها وتطويرها، بما يخدم المصالح المشتركة للبلدين الصديقين، كما تم استعراض عدد من الموضوعات ذات الاهتمام المشترك في المجالات العسكرية والعملياتية. Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi held separate phone calls with his Turkish and Saudi counterparts to discuss the latest regional developments following US strikes on southern Iran.
#IRGC has released footage of its retaliatory missile operation targeting the #US bases and assets in the region #IranWar‌

Iran's Foreign Ministry has condemned US strikes on southern Iran in the early hours of Wednesday as a flagrant violation of the UN Charter, confirming Iranian Armed Forces struck US assets in the region in retaliation.
Iran's IRGC struck a U.S. airbase in Al-Azraq, Jordan, on Wednesday, hitting four key targets, including F-35 fighter shelters and a command and control centre with long-range solid-fuel missiles.

The Iranian army launched a wave of drone strikes against U.S. bases and radar systems of the U.S. Fifth Fleet in Bahrain early Wednesday in retaliation for American actions against residents of southern Iran.
